message:
fix(config): make path_mode parsing case-insensitive and whitespace-tolerant

Previously `path_mode()` compared the raw config string directly
against lowercase literals like "basename", "full", "hash". This
meant that values like "Basename", " FULL ", or "HASH" would silently
fall through to the default `PathMode::Full`, which is confusing
because validation accepts these variants.

The parser now trims whitespace and lowercases the input before
matching, so the runtime behavior is consistent with what config
validation permits.

Added tests for mixed-case ("Basename") and padded (" FULL ") inputs
to lock down the new tolerance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
